titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to mu'awiyah Ibn Shurayh
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to mu'awiyah Ibn Shurayh

segments: ه عن معاوية بن شريح فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن عثمان بن عيسى، عن معاوية بن شريح‌.
arabic.text: ه عن معاوية بن شريح فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن عثمان بن عيسى، عن معاوية بن شريح‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Mu'awiyah ibn Shurayh has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa, from 'Uthman ibn 'Isa, from Mu'awiyah ibn Shurayh.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Mu'awiyah ibn Shurayh has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa, from 'Uthman ibn 'Isa, from Mu'awiyah ibn Shurayh.
